title: Zidane waits as Deschamps steps down as France coach
description: Recent reports indicate Didier Deschamps is leaving his role after a World Cup defeat, with Zidane mentioned as a waiting figure.

sources.title: Deschamps says stifling atmosphere led to his decision to step down as France coach
Didier Deschamps bids farewell to French team after spectacular World Cup defeat
France vs England: Deschamps set for final World Cup match as Zidane waits

sections.heading: Reason for Departure
paragraphs: According to Reuters, Deschamps says a stifling atmosphere led to his decision to step down as France coach.

sections.heading: World Cup Context
paragraphs: Le Monde.fr reports that Didier Deschamps bids farewell to the French team after a spectacular World Cup defeat.

sections.heading: Zidane's Role
paragraphs: Al Jazeera reports that Deschamps is set for his final World Cup match as Zidane waits.

faq.q: Why is Didier Deschamps stepping down?
faq.a: According to Reuters, Deschamps stated that a stifling atmosphere led to his decision to step down as France coach.

faq.q: What is the connection between Deschamps and Zidane?
faq.a: Al Jazeera reports that Deschamps is set for his final World Cup match as Zidane waits.
